Let me start by reading the file to understand the full context.

Now let me reason through the required changes:

**Migration rules to apply:**

1. **`title` prop on `<Modal>` (line 35)**: The `title` prop must move from `<Modal>` to a new `<ModalHeader>` child component.

2. **Children of `<Modal>` need wrapping**: The `Bullseye` (line 38) and `Alert` (line 42) are direct children of `<Modal>` but need to be wrapped in `<ModalBody>` per the conformance rule `sd-cf-modal-modal-req-wrap`.

**Changes needed:**

1. Remove `title={action}` from `<Modal>` props.
2. Add `<ModalHeader title={action} />` as a child of `<Modal>`.
3. Wrap the existing children (the ternary with `Bullseye`/`Alert`) in `<ModalBody>`.
4. Add `ModalHeader` and `ModalBody` to the imports from `@patternfly/react-core`.

Let me apply these changes:

arguments.after:
<Modal
        variant={ModalVariant.small}
        isOpen={isOpen}
        onClose={closeModal}
      >
        <ModalHeader title={action} />
        <ModalBody>
          {!loaded ? (
            <Bullseye>
              <Spinner size="lg" />
            </Bullseye>
          ) : (
            <Alert variant="danger" title={t('Failed to fetch application')}>
              {error?.message}
            </Alert>
          )}
        </ModalBody>
      </Modal>
arguments.before:
<Modal
        variant={ModalVariant.small}
        isOpen={isOpen}
        onClose={closeModal}
        title={action}
      >
        {!loaded ? (
          <Bullseye>
            <Spinner size="lg" />
          </Bullseye>
        ) : (
          <Alert variant="danger" title={t('Failed to fetch application')}>
            {error?.message}
          </Alert>
        )}
      </Modal>
